title: Previous versions - SonarQube for IDE Documentation - IntelliJ
content:
# Previous versions

## [Installing previous versions](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-for-ide/intellij/previous-versions/#installing-previous-versions "Installing previous versions")

Previous versions of SonarQube for IntelliJ are available on the [JetBrains Marketplace](https://plugins.jetbrains.com/plugin/7973-sonarlint/versions "JetBrains Marketplace"); there, you will also find a table to find the minimum requirements for your version.

To install a previous version, simply follow the [Offline installation instructions](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-for-ide/intellij/getting-started/offline-installation/ "Offline installation instructions") by first downloading the appropriate version.

Previous versions of SonarQube for IDE are compatible with specific versions of IntelliJ. A full compatibility matrix is available on the [JetBrains Marketplace](https://plugins.jetbrains.com/plugin/7973-sonarlint/versions "JetBrains Marketplace").
